name: plantSelection
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.recommendations.every(p => typeof p.name === 'string' && typeof p.type === 'string')
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data (ProLandscape.callLand channel: runDomain → {input:{artifact:{data}}} peeled at dispatch). zone = parseInt(hardnessZone)||7. Filters the built-in 6-plant library by zone-range + sun (full|shade plus partial-as-wildcard) + soil membership. Result card (PlantSelector) renders zone/sunExposure/soilType/recommendations[].{name,type}/totalMatches EXACTLY; totalMatches === recommendations.length. NaN/Infinity zone falls back to 7 (parseInt → NaN → ||7) — never NaN.
